app.name: MyLoo
app.live_status: iOS in Apple review, Android paused

short.tagline: Privacy-first digestion tracker with AI Bristol classification and 30-day clinic export.
short.what_it_is: MyLoo is a digestion and stool tracker for iOS (Android launch on hold — Google Health Policy 2026). Photo of the sample, Claude Vision AI classifies on the Bristol Stool Scale 1-7, plus volume / texture / blood / mucus flags. Privacy-first: photos are NOT stored, only the structured result lives in the timeline. Symptom tags (bloating, cramps, urgency, pain). 30-day PDF export for GI appointment.
short.who_for: Adults with IBS, IBD, gut sensitivities, food intolerances, post-surgical follow-up. Parents tracking toddler health. Chronic-condition patients.
key_features: Photo-to-Bristol AI classification: Vision returns Bristol 1-7 + flags.
Privacy-first photo handling: not persisted on Klar infrastructure.
Symptom tags timeline: bloating, cramps, urgency, pain level.
30-day clinic PDF export for GI appointment.
Discreet clinical UI: deliberately calm, not wellness-influencer aesthetic.
business_model_lines: Single revenue stream: recurring Premium subscription.
Pricing: 4.99 USD / month or 29.99 USD / year.
Free tier: manual Bristol entry + tags, timeline, manual PDF export.
Premium unlocks: AI photo classification, email-inbound scanning, extended clinic export.
Platform: iOS only. Android paused — Google Health Policy requires registered org + D-U-N-S.
short.attribution_one_paragraph: Your link myloo.org/i/[handle] works on every platform. iOS warm uses Universal Links. iOS cold (~99% of creator traffic, iOS-only) uses our signed-token clipboard deferred-deeplink — live-verified, no Branch.io. RevenueCat fires on Premium purchase, 50% of net revenue credited to your handle for 24 months. Android attribution activates via Google install-referrer once Android relaunches.
short.see_long_pointer: For the full walkthrough, the Google Health Policy context for Android pause, and how the privacy-first photo handling actually works, see the Extended Brief PDF.
short.attribution_extra_note: Android is currently paused due to Google's Health Policy 2026 (requires registered organisation + D-U-N-S verification). Your link works for Android users — they hit a waitlist page. Once Android relaunches, attribution applies retroactively to waitlisters.

long.tagline: Privacy-first digestion tracker with AI Bristol classification and 30-day clinic export.
long.what_it_is: MyLoo is a digestion and stool tracker for iOS (Android launch on hold due to Google's Health Policy 2026). Photo of the sample, Claude Vision AI classifies on the Bristol Stool Scale 1-7, plus volume / texture / blood / mucus flags. Privacy-first: photos are NOT stored on our side, only the structured result lives in the timeline. The timeline carries symptom tags (bloating, cramps, urgency, pain level), and the user exports a clean 30-day PDF for their GI appointment.
long.who_for: Adults dealing with IBS, IBD, gut sensitivities, food intolerances, post-surgical follow-up. Parents tracking toddler health (adult-audience targeting only). Chronic-condition patients (coeliac etc.). Creator archetypes that convert well: gut-health educators with real lived experience, IBS day-in-the-life creators, low-FODMAP food channels, post-gastro-surgery journals, patient-advocate IBS/IBD pages, medical-professional accounts (nurses, dieticians) in personal capacity.
key_features: Photo-to-Bristol AI classification: Vision returns Bristol 1-7 + volume/texture/blood/mucus flags.
Privacy-first photo handling: image processed in Vision call, not persisted on Klar infrastructure.
Symptom tags timeline: bloating, cramps, urgency, pain level on simple scale, cross-tagged with food.
30-day clinic PDF export: handed to GI at appointment, replaces 4 weeks of recall.
Email-inbound parsing (Premium): parses lab or food-sensitivity test PDFs into the timeline.
Discreet clinical UI: deliberately calm, not the wellness-influencer aesthetic.
business_model_lines: Single revenue stream: recurring Premium subscription.
Free tier: manual Bristol entry + tags, timeline, manual PDF export — useful enough alone.
Premium unlocks: AI photo classification, email-inbound scanning, extended clinic export.
Free Lifetime Premium for onboarded affiliates.
Platform: iOS only. Android paused — Google's Health Policy 2026 requires registered org + D-U-N-S.
pricing_lines: 29.99 USD / year (~ half off vs monthly).
iOS only currently; affiliate share is 50% of the then-current price.
long.market_gap: IBS and IBD patients track their symptoms in Word docs, Notes apps, or notebooks. That is the baseline — surveys consistently find 70-80% of patients arrive at GI appointments with no structured data. The wellness-influencer-flavoured apps (Cara Care, Bowelle, Poop Tracker) are designed for the algorithm rather than the patient: bright colours, social features, gamification. Patients with real conditions describe these as cringe or patronising and abandon them. Meanwhile clinical-grade tools (Cara's clinical fork, Sentinel) live behind clinic walls. MyLoo fills the gap: clinical visual identity, AI photo classification (the time-saver), 30-day GI-ready PDF export. Privacy-first photo handling (images never persisted) is the trust unlock.
long.business_model_why_now: Two shifts make MyLoo possible in 2026. First, Vision LLM costs dropped enough that classifying a Bristol photo at 0.01-0.02 USD per call is economically viable inside a 5 USD/month price point. Second, the privacy-first architecture (photos never persisted) is now table-stakes expectation in health apps post-2024 European Health Data Space regulations and US state-level health-data laws.
long.why_this_works: Gut-health content has explosive engagement on TikTok and Instagram, and the audience is genuinely seeking and willing to try new tools. MyLoo's clinical-calm visual identity is a real differentiator from the wellness-influencer aesthetic that dominates and feels untrustworthy to people with real conditions. AI Bristol classification is a feature most competitors do not have. Word-doc tracking is the reality for ~80% of IBS patients — MyLoo solves exactly that switch.
long.attribution_extra_note: Android is currently paused due to Google's Health Policy 2026, which requires a registered organisation account with D-U-N-S verification for any app handling personal health data. We are working through that path; affiliates can expect Android to come back online once the corporate-account migration finishes. Meanwhile your link still works for Android users — they hit a landing page explaining the iOS-only status and a waitlist signup.

short.tagline: Privacy-first Verdauungs-Tracker mit KI Bristol-Klassifikation und 30-Tage-Klinik-Export.
short.what_it_is: MyLoo ist ein Verdauungs- und Stuhl-Tracker für iOS (Android-Launch auf Eis — Google Health Policy 2026). Foto der Probe, Claude Vision KI klassifiziert auf Bristol-Stuhl-Skala 1-7, plus Volumen / Textur / Blut / Schleim-Flags. Privacy-first: Fotos werden NICHT gespeichert, nur das strukturierte Ergebnis lebt in der Timeline. Symptom-Tags (Blähungen, Krämpfe, Dringlichkeit, Schmerz). 30-Tage-PDF-Export für GI-Termin.
short.who_for: Erwachsene mit IBS, IBD, Darm-Sensitivitäten, Lebensmittel-Intoleranzen, post-OP-Follow-up. Eltern die Kleinkind-Gesundheit tracken. Chronisch-Kranke.
key_features: Foto-zu-Bristol KI-Klassifikation: Vision liefert Bristol 1-7 + Flags.
Privacy-first Foto-Handling: nicht auf Klar-Infrastruktur persistiert.
Symptom-Tags-Timeline: Blähungen, Krämpfe, Dringlichkeit, Schmerz-Level.
30-Tage-Klinik-PDF-Export für GI-Termin.
Diskrete klinische UI: bewusst ruhig, kein Wellness-Influencer-Look.
business_model_lines: Einzelne Revenue-Quelle: wiederkehrende Premium-Subscription.
Pricing: 4,99 USD / Monat oder 29,99 USD / Jahr.
Free-Tier: manuelle Bristol-Eingabe + Tags, Timeline, manueller PDF-Export.
Premium schaltet frei: KI-Foto-Klassifikation, Email-Inbound-Scanning, erweiterter Klinik-Export.
Plattform: nur iOS. Android pausiert — Google Health Policy verlangt registrierte Org + D-U-N-S.
short.attribution_one_paragraph: Dein Link myloo.org/i/[handle] funktioniert auf jeder Plattform. iOS warm nutzt Universal Links. iOS cold (~99% Creator-Traffic, iOS-only) nutzt unseren signed-Token Clipboard-Deferred-Deeplink — live-verifiziert, kein Branch.io. RevenueCat feuert beim Premium-Kauf, 50% des Netto-Umsatzes auf deinen Handle für 24 Monate. Android-Attribution aktiviert sich via Google Install-Referrer sobald Android relaunched.
short.see_long_pointer: Für das volle Walkthrough, den Google-Health-Policy-Kontext für Android-Pause, und wie das Privacy-first-Foto-Handling tatsächlich funktioniert, siehe das Extended Brief PDF.
short.attribution_extra_note: Android ist aktuell pausiert wegen Googles Health Policy 2026 (verlangt registrierte Organisation + D-U-N-S-Verifizierung). Dein Link funktioniert für Android-User — sie landen auf einer Waitlist-Seite. Sobald Android relaunched, gilt die Attribution rückwirkend für Waitlister.

long.tagline: Privacy-first Verdauungs-Tracker mit KI Bristol-Klassifikation und 30-Tage-Klinik-Export.
long.what_it_is: MyLoo ist ein Verdauungs- und Stuhl-Tracker für iOS (Android-Launch auf Eis wegen Googles Health Policy 2026). Foto der Probe, Claude Vision KI klassifiziert auf Bristol-Stuhl-Skala 1-7, plus Volumen / Textur / Blut / Schleim-Flags. Privacy-first: Fotos werden NICHT bei uns gespeichert, nur das strukturierte Ergebnis lebt in der Timeline. Die Timeline trägt Symptom-Tags (Blähungen, Krämpfe, Dringlichkeit, Schmerz-Level), und der User exportiert ein sauberes 30-Tage-PDF für seinen GI-Termin.
long.who_for: Erwachsene mit IBS, IBD, Darm-Sensitivitäten, Lebensmittel-Intoleranzen, post-OP-Follow-up. Eltern die Kleinkind-Gesundheit tracken (nur Erwachsenen-Audience-Targeting). Chronisch-Kranke (Zöliakie etc.). Passende Creator: Gut-Health-Educator mit echter Erfahrung, IBS-Day-in-the-Life-Creator, Low-FODMAP-Food-Channels, Post-Gastro-OP-Journale, Patient-Advocate-IBS/IBD-Pages, Healthcare-Professionals (Pfleger, Diätberater) in privater Kapazität.
key_features: Foto-zu-Bristol KI-Klassifikation: Vision liefert Bristol 1-7 + Volumen/Textur/Blut/Schleim-Flags.
Privacy-first Foto-Handling: Bild im Vision-Call verarbeitet, nicht auf Klar-Infrastruktur persistiert.
Symptom-Tags-Timeline: einfache Skala, cross-tagged mit Food-Entries.
30-Tage-Klinik-PDF-Export: beim Termin übergeben, ersetzt 4 Wochen Erinnerungsversuch.
Email-Inbound-Parsing (Premium): parst eingehende Labor- oder Food-Sensitivity-Test-PDFs in die Timeline.
Diskrete klinische UI: bewusst ruhig, kein Wellness-Influencer-Look.
business_model_lines: Einzelne Revenue-Quelle: wiederkehrende Premium-Subscription.
Free-Tier: manuelle Bristol-Eingabe + Tags, Timeline, manueller PDF-Export — alleine nützlich genug.
Premium schaltet frei: KI-Foto-Klassifikation, Email-Inbound-Scanning, erweiterter Klinik-Export.
Free Lifetime Premium für onboarded Affiliates.
Plattform: nur iOS. Android pausiert — Googles Health Policy 2026 verlangt registrierte Org + D-U-N-S.
pricing_lines: 29,99 USD / Jahr (~ halb so viel wie monatlich).
Nur iOS aktuell; Affiliate-Share ist 50% des aktuellen Preises.
long.market_gap: IBS- und IBD-Patienten tracken ihre Symptome in Word-Docs, Notes-Apps oder Notizbüchern. Das ist der Baseline — Studien zeigen konstant 70-80% der Patienten kommen ohne strukturierte Daten zum GI-Termin. Die Wellness-Influencer-flavored Apps (Cara Care, Bowelle, Poop Tracker) sind für den Algorithmus designed statt für den Patienten: bunte Farben, Social-Features, Gamification. Patienten mit echten Konditionen beschreiben sie als cringe oder bevormundend und brechen ab. Clinical-grade Tools (Caras klinischer Fork, Sentinel) leben hinter Klinik-Mauern. MyLoo füllt die Lücke: klinische visuelle Identität, KI-Foto-Klassifikation (der Zeit-Sparer), 30-Tage-GI-bereiter PDF-Export. Privacy-first-Foto-Handling (Bilder nie persistiert) ist der Trust-Unlock.
long.business_model_why_now: Zwei Verschiebungen machen MyLoo 2026 möglich. Erstens, Vision-LLM-Kosten sind genug gefallen dass das Klassifizieren eines Bristol-Fotos bei 0,01-0,02 USD pro Call ökonomisch tragbar ist im 5-USD/Monat-Preispunkt. Zweitens, die Privacy-first-Architektur (Fotos nie persistiert) ist jetzt Table-Stakes-Erwartung in Health-Apps nach 2024er European Health Data Space-Regulierungen und US-State-Level-Health-Data-Gesetzen.
long.why_this_works: Gut-Health-Content hat explosive Engagement auf TikTok und Instagram, und die Audience sucht aktiv und ist bereit neue Tools auszuprobieren. MyLoos klinisch-ruhige visuelle Identität ist ein echter Differentiator zur Wellness-Influencer-Ästhetik die die Kategorie dominiert und sich für Patienten mit echten Konditionen un-vertrauenswürdig anfühlt. KI Bristol-Klassifikation ist ein Feature das die meisten Konkurrenten nicht haben. Word-Doc-Tracking ist die Realität für ~80% der IBS-Patienten — MyLoo löst genau diesen Switch.
long.attribution_extra_note: Android ist aktuell pausiert wegen Googles Health Policy 2026, die ein registriertes Organisations-Konto mit D-U-N-S-Verifizierung für jede App verlangt die persönliche Gesundheitsdaten handhabt. Wir arbeiten an dem Pfad; Affiliates können Android-Comeback erwarten sobald die Corporate-Account-Migration fertig ist. Bis dahin funktioniert dein Link für Android-User — sie landen auf einer Landing-Page die den iOS-only-Status erklärt und einer Waitlist-Anmeldung.

short.tagline: Tracker della digestione privacy-first con classificazione Bristol AI ed export clinico 30 giorni.
short.what_it_is: MyLoo è un tracker di digestione/feci per iOS (Android in pausa — Google Health Policy 2026). Foto del campione, Claude Vision AI classifica sulla Bristol Stool Scale 1-7, più flag volume/texture/sangue/muco. Privacy-first: le foto NON sono salvate, solo il risultato strutturato vive nella timeline. Tag sintomi (gonfiore, crampi, urgenza, dolore). Export PDF 30 giorni per visita GI.
short.who_for: Adulti con IBS, IBD, sensibilità intestinali, intolleranze alimentari, follow-up post-chirurgico. Genitori che tracciano salute bambini piccoli. Pazienti cronici.
key_features: Classificazione foto-a-Bristol AI: Vision restituisce Bristol 1-7 + flag.
Gestione foto privacy-first: non persistite su infrastruttura Klar.
Timeline tag sintomi: gonfiore, crampi, urgenza, livello dolore.
Export PDF clinico 30 giorni per visita GI.
UI clinica discreta: deliberatamente calma, non look wellness-influencer.
business_model_lines: Una sola fonte: abbonamento Premium ricorrente.
Prezzo: 4,99 USD/mese o 29,99 USD/anno.
Tier gratis: inserimento Bristol manuale + tag, timeline, export PDF manuale.
Premium sblocca: classificazione AI, scan email-inbound, export clinico esteso.
Piattaforma: solo iOS. Android pausato — Google Health Policy.
short.attribution_one_paragraph: Il tuo link myloo.org/i/[handle] funziona su ogni piattaforma. iOS warm Universal Links. iOS cold (~99% traffico creator, iOS-only) deferred-deeplink firmato via clipboard — verificato live, senza Branch.io. RevenueCat fa fuoco all'acquisto Premium, 50% al tuo handle per 24 mesi. Attribuzione Android attiva via install-referrer Google quando Android relaunches.
short.see_long_pointer: Per walkthrough completo, contesto Google Health Policy per la pausa Android, e come funziona il privacy-first delle foto, vedi il Brief Esteso PDF.
short.attribution_extra_note: Android è attualmente in pausa per la Google Health Policy 2026 (richiede organizzazione registrata + verifica D-U-N-S). Il tuo link funziona per utenti Android — atterrano su una pagina waitlist. Quando Android relaunches l'attribuzione si applica retroattivamente.

long.tagline: Tracker della digestione privacy-first con classificazione Bristol AI ed export clinico 30 giorni.
long.what_it_is: MyLoo è un tracker di digestione e feci per iOS (lancio Android in pausa per Google Health Policy 2026). Foto del campione, Claude Vision AI classifica sulla Bristol Stool Scale 1-7, più flag volume/texture/sangue/muco. Privacy-first: foto NON salvate, solo il risultato strutturato vive in timeline. Tag sintomi (gonfiore, crampi, urgenza, dolore). Export PDF 30 giorni per visita GI.
long.who_for: Adulti con IBS, IBD, sensibilità intestinali, intolleranze alimentari, follow-up post-chirurgico. Genitori salute bambini. Pazienti cronici. Archetipi creator che convertono bene: educatori gut-health con esperienza vissuta, IBS day-in-the-life, low-FODMAP food channels, journals post-chirurgia GI, patient-advocate IBS/IBD pages, professionisti sanitari in capacità personale.
key_features: Foto-a-Bristol AI: Bristol 1-7 + flag.
Privacy-first: foto non persistite su Klar.
Timeline tag sintomi cross-tagged con food.
Export PDF clinico 30 giorni.
Parsing email-inbound (Premium): test laboratorio/intolleranze.
UI clinica discreta.
business_model_lines: Una sola fonte: abbonamento Premium ricorrente.
Tier gratis: inserimento Bristol manuale + tag, timeline, export PDF manuale — utile da solo.
Premium sblocca: classificazione AI, scan email-inbound, export clinico esteso.
Premium gratuito a vita per affiliati onboarded.
Piattaforma: solo iOS. Android pausato.
pricing_lines: 29,99 USD / anno (~ metà rispetto al mensile).
Solo iOS; quota affiliato 50% del prezzo del momento.
long.market_gap: Pazienti IBS e IBD tracciano sintomi in Word doc, app Note, o quaderni. Sondaggi mostrano costantemente che il 70-80% arriva alla visita GI senza dati strutturati. Le app wellness-flavoured (Cara Care, Bowelle, Poop Tracker) sono progettate per l'algoritmo invece che per il paziente: colori vivaci, social, gamification. Pazienti reali le descrivono come cringe e le abbandonano. Strumenti clinical-grade vivono dietro le mura cliniche. MyLoo riempie la lacuna: identità visiva clinica, classificazione AI foto, export PDF 30 giorni GI-ready. La privacy-first sulle foto è lo sblocco di fiducia.
long.business_model_why_now: Due cambiamenti. Primo, i costi Vision LLM sono scesi abbastanza da rendere economicamente sostenibile classificare una foto Bristol a 0,01-0,02 USD per call al prezzo 5 USD/mese. Secondo, l'architettura privacy-first (foto mai persistite) è ora aspettativa table-stakes nelle health-app post-regolamentazioni European Health Data Space 2024 e leggi health-data statali USA.
long.why_this_works: Il contenuto gut-health ha engagement esplosivo su TikTok e Instagram, e l'audience cerca attivamente nuovi strumenti. L'identità visiva clinico-calma di MyLoo è un vero differenziatore dall'estetica wellness-influencer che domina e suona poco affidabile a pazienti reali. La classificazione AI Bristol è una funzionalità che la maggior parte dei competitor non ha.
long.attribution_extra_note: Android è attualmente in pausa per la Google Health Policy 2026, che richiede un account organizzazione registrato con verifica D-U-N-S per qualunque app che gestisca dati personali sulla salute. Stiamo lavorando al percorso; affiliati possono aspettarsi il ritorno di Android una volta finita la migrazione corporate-account.

short.tagline: Tracker de digestion privacy-first avec classification Bristol IA et export clinique 30 jours.

Premium desbloquea: clasificación IA, escaneo email-inbound, export clínico extendido.
Plataforma: solo iOS. Android en pausa — Google Health Policy.
short.attribution_one_paragraph: Tu enlace myloo.org/i/[handle] funciona en cualquier plataforma. iOS warm Universal Links. iOS cold (~99 % del tráfico creator, iOS-only) deferred-deeplink firmado vía portapapeles — verificado en vivo, sin Branch.io. RevenueCat se dispara en la compra Premium, 50 % a tu handle durante 24 meses. Atribución Android se activa vía install-referrer Google cuando Android relaunche.
short.see_long_pointer: Para el walkthrough completo, el contexto Google Health Policy para la pausa Android, y cómo funciona el privacy-first de las fotos, ver el Brief Ampliado PDF.
short.attribution_extra_note: Android está actualmente en pausa por la Google Health Policy 2026 (requiere organización registrada + verificación D-U-N-S). Tu enlace funciona para usuarios Android — aterrizan en una página waitlist. Cuando Android relaunche, la atribución se aplica retroactivamente.

long.tagline: Tracker de digestión privacy-first con clasificación Bristol IA y export clínico 30 días.
long.what_it_is: MyLoo es un tracker de digestión y heces para iOS (lanzamiento Android en pausa por la Google Health Policy 2026). Foto de la muestra, Claude Vision IA clasifica en la Bristol Stool Scale 1-7, más flags volumen/textura/sangre/moco. Privacy-first: fotos NO almacenadas, solo el resultado estructurado vive en timeline. Tags síntomas. Export PDF 30 días para cita GI.
long.who_for: Adultos con IBS, IBD, sensibilidades intestinales, intolerancias alimentarias, seguimiento post-quirúrgico. Padres salud niños. Pacientes crónicos. Arquetipos creators que convierten bien: educadores gut-health con experiencia vivida, IBS day-in-the-life, low-FODMAP food channels, diarios post-cirugía GI, patient-advocate IBS/IBD, profesionales de salud en capacidad personal.
key_features: Foto-a-Bristol IA: Bristol 1-7 + flags.
Privacy-first: fotos no persistidas en Klar.
Timeline tags síntomas cross-tagged con food.
Export PDF clínico 30 días.
Parsing email-inbound (Premium): tests labo/intolerancias.
UI clínica discreta.
business_model_lines: Una sola fuente: suscripción Premium recurrente.
Nivel gratis: entrada Bristol manual + tags, timeline, export PDF manual — útil solo.
Premium desbloquea: clasificación IA, escaneo email-inbound, export clínico extendido.
Premium gratis de por vida para afiliados onboarded.
Plataforma: solo iOS. Android en pausa.
pricing_lines: Solo iOS; cuota afiliado 50 % del precio del momento.
long.market_gap: Pacientes IBS y IBD rastrean síntomas en Word doc, apps Notas, o cuadernos. Las encuestas muestran constantemente que el 70-80 % llega a la cita GI sin datos estructurados. Las apps wellness-flavoured (Cara Care, Bowelle, Poop Tracker) están diseñadas para el algoritmo en lugar de para el paciente: colores vivos, social, gamification. Los pacientes reales las describen como cringe y las abandonan. Herramientas clinical-grade viven detrás de los muros clínicos. MyLoo llena el hueco: identidad visual clínica, clasificación IA foto, export PDF 30 días GI-ready. El privacy-first sobre las fotos es el desbloqueo de confianza.
long.business_model_why_now: Dos cambios. Primero, los costos Vision LLM bajaron lo suficiente para hacer económicamente viable clasificar una foto Bristol a 0,01-0,02 USD por llamada al precio 5 USD/mes. Segundo, la arquitectura privacy-first (fotos nunca persistidas) ahora es expectativa table-stakes en health-apps post-regulaciones European Health Data Space 2024 y leyes health-data estatales US.
long.why_this_works: El contenido gut-health tiene engagement explosivo en TikTok e Instagram, y la audiencia busca activamente nuevas herramientas. La identidad visual clínico-calma de MyLoo es un verdadero diferenciador de la estética wellness-influencer que domina y se siente poco confiable para pacientes reales. La clasificación IA Bristol es una funcionalidad que la mayoría de competidores no tienen.
long.attribution_extra_note: Android está actualmente en pausa por la Google Health Policy 2026, que requiere una cuenta organización registrada con verificación D-U-N-S para cualquier app que maneje datos de salud personales. Estamos trabajando en el camino; afiliados pueden esperar el regreso de Android una vez terminada la migración corporate-account.

en.subtitle: for patient advocates and gut-health creators — and what the research says about how to pitch it
en.hero_quote: Photo in, AI classifies, clinic PDF out. Privacy-first. Earn from the value you already create.
en.sixty_seconds_intro: MyLoo is a digestion / stool tracker for iOS (Android on hold — Google Health Policy 2026). Photo of the sample, Claude Vision AI classifies on the Bristol Stool Scale 1-7. Privacy-first: photos NOT stored, only structured result lives in timeline. Symptom tags, 30-day PDF for GI appointment.
en.why_this_works: Word-doc tracking is reality for 80% of IBS patients. MyLoo solves exactly that: at the GI appointment you show a PDF with real data instead of talking retrospectively for 4 weeks.
free_vs_premium: Free: manual Bristol entry + symptom tags, timeline, manual PDF export.
Premium (4.99 USD/m or 29.99 USD/y): AI photo classification, email-inbound parsing, extended export.
Free Lifetime Premium for onboarded affiliates.
en.creator_types_intro: For MyLoo specifically, lived-experience creators convert dramatically higher than aesthetic accounts — health audiences see through performance.

creator_types_table.hooks: Word-doc moment; "how I prep for my GI appointment"; 30-day PDF reveal; "finally a tool I trust"
Food-symptom correlation timeline; "what I ate vs how I felt"; trigger-discovery story
Educational explainer with personal data; "why the Bristol scale matters"; "what to bring to your GI"
"What I wish my patients tracked"; clinical-grade tool walkthrough; "the PDF I want at appointments"
Silent Bristol-scale education; symptom-tracking voiceless tutorial; privacy-first photo handling demo
Recovery timeline; "what helped me feel heard at appointments"; structured tracking value

ugc_strategy.archetype: You with the condition. IBS patient sharing day-in-the-life. Post-surgery person tracking recovery. Patient advocate with credibility your audience trusts. Health-condition content sees through performance — your lived experience is the entire credibility model.
hook_examples: "This replaced my Word doc" — talking head with real 4-week Word doc, then MyLoo timeline.
"How I prep for my GI appointment now" — calm 60s, ending with PDF export.
"Year one of IBS — what I wish I'd tracked from day one" — retrospective.
"My GI doc actually engaged with the data this time" — post-appointment debrief.
"AI classified what I couldn't bring myself to look at" — privacy angle.
"What changed in 30 days of tracking" — pattern-discovery.
"Why the Bristol scale matters and why nobody told you" — educational.
"My low-FODMAP elimination week — what the timeline showed" — food correlation.
do_dont: Do: only post if you actually have the condition or work in the space.
Do: name your condition or context specifically.

faceless_strategy.archetype: Anonymous patient educator. Healthcare professional in personal capacity. Voiceover-only chronic-condition account. Many gut-health TikTok creators are intentionally anonymous because privacy is part of their value.
hook_examples: Silent Bristol-scale infographic carousel.
30s screen-rec of AI classification with voiceover.
"Privacy-first photo handling — what 'not stored' actually means" — explainer carousel.
"What to bring to your first GI appointment" — tutorial carousel.
"5 apps that actually help with IBS" — listicle, MyLoo at #1-2.
Symptom-tracking time-lapse — anonymous hand.
"The Bristol scale — three things most patients don't know" — silent reel.
Comparison: Word-doc-vs-MyLoo split-screen.
format_templates: Educational carousel: 6 slides, calm clinical aesthetic.
do_dont: Do: clinical-calm tone — MyLoo's audience-fit is patients who hate wellness aesthetics.
Do: cite credible sources (NHS, Mayo Clinic, Rome IV) when teaching.
Don't: pretend to be a patient if you're not.

audience_fit_poor: Diagnostic / 'AI tells you what's wrong' angle.
General lifestyle accounts without real gut-health connection.
en.posting_cadence: Gut-health: Sunday evening + Wednesday evening. IBS day-in-the-life: Tue-Thu morning. Patient-advocate: late evening 9-11pm. 1 reel per week. Stories with link after GI appointments drive conversion.
en.conversion_math: 50% rev share, 24 months. Premium 4.99 USD/m or 29.99 USD/y. IBS day-in-the-life micro (40k followers): 20,000 views x 2.5% CTR = 500 clicks, 40% install = 200 installs, 6% Premium = 12 subs, ~180 USD per reel. Patient-advocate mid-tier (100k): 50,000 views x 2% CTR = 1,000 clicks, 35% install = 350 installs, 5% Premium = 17 subs, ~255 USD. Anonymous gut-health macro (300k TT): 150,000 views x 1% CTR = 1,500 clicks, 30% install = 450 installs, 4% Premium = 18 subs, ~270 USD. Chronic-condition users keep subs longer than average, so 24-month attribution pays out fully more often.
en.brand_assets: Logo, app screenshots, Bristol-scale educational slides (medically reviewed), clinical-calm visual identity and ready-made captions: getklar.org/i/myloo/brand-assets.
faq: I'm a healthcare professional, can I post about MyLoo?
Yes, in personal capacity with disclosure. Frame as 'a tool patients can use', not 'a tool that diagnoses'. Follow your local regulatory rules.
What about Android?

Built and tested but paused at Google's Health Policy step (corporate-account + D-U-N-S required). Your link works for Android — waitlist page. Attribution applies retroactively when Android relaunches.
Can I show real photos?
No. Privacy-first means photos are never stored — that's the trust unlock. Use structured-result view (timeline, Bristol, tags).
Disclosure?
Yes, rev-share = paid recommendation. Plus: healthcare professionals follow local conduct rules.
Flat fee?
Mid-tier $150-500, macros $500+. Rev share stays on top.
What if I lose niche credibility?
Don't post if MyLoo doesn't fit your lived experience or professional context. We'd rather miss the post than damage credibility.
en.closing: Honest read: MyLoo fits creators with real gut-health experience or professional context. If you don't have IBS, don't work in healthcare, and your audience isn't in a health niche, this is not a fit and we'd rather you not post. Patient audiences see through performance. Reply to Mail 2 if you want to talk — yes, no, or 'maybe, let's see'.

de.conversion_math: 50% Rev-Share, 24 Monate. Premium 4,99 USD/m oder 29,99 USD/y. IBS Day-in-the-Life Mikro (40k Follower): 20.000 Views x 2,5% CTR = 500 Clicks, 40% Install = 200 Installs, 6% Premium = 12 Subs, ~180 USD pro Reel. Patient-Advocate Mid-Tier (100k): 50.000 Views x 2% CTR = 1.000 Clicks, 35% Install = 350 Installs, 5% Premium = 17 Subs, ~255 USD. Anonymer Gut-Health Macro (300k TT): 150.000 Views x 1% CTR = 1.500 Clicks, 30% Install = 450 Installs, 4% Premium = 18 Subs, ~270 USD. Chronisch-Krank-User halten Subs länger als Durchschnitt, also 24-Monate-Attribution zahlt häufiger voll aus.
de.brand_assets: Logo, App-Screenshots, Bristol-Skala-Educational-Slides (medizinisch reviewed), klinisch-ruhige visuelle Identität und fertige Captions: getklar.org/i/myloo/brand-assets.
faq: Ich bin Healthcare-Professional, kann ich über MyLoo posten?
Ja, in privater Kapazität mit Disclosure. Framen als 'Tool das Patienten nutzen können', nicht 'Tool das diagnostiziert'. Lokale Berufs-Regeln befolgen.
Was ist mit Android?

Gebaut und getestet aber pausiert beim Google-Health-Policy-Schritt (Corporate-Account + D-U-N-S erforderlich). Dein Link funktioniert für Android — Waitlist-Page. Attribution gilt rückwirkend wenn Android relaunched.
Kann ich echte Fotos zeigen?
Nein. Privacy-first bedeutet Fotos werden nie gespeichert — das ist der Trust-Unlock. Nutze die strukturierte Ergebnis-Ansicht (Timeline, Bristol, Tags).
Kennzeichnung?
Ja, Rev-Share = bezahlte Empfehlung. Plus: Healthcare-Professionals folgen lokalen Berufs-Regeln.
Flat-Fee?
Mid-Tier $150-500, Macros $500+. Rev-Share bleibt obendrauf.
Was wenn ich Nischen-Glaubwürdigkeit verliere?
Nicht posten wenn MyLoo nicht zu deiner echten Erfahrung oder beruflichem Kontext passt. Wir verzichten lieber auf den Post als deine Glaubwürdigkeit zu schädigen.
de.closing: Ehrlich: MyLoo passt zu Creators mit echter Gut-Health-Erfahrung oder beruflichem Kontext. Wenn du kein IBS hast, nicht im Healthcare arbeitest, und deine Audience nicht in einer Health-Nische ist, passt nicht und wir hätten lieber dass du nicht postest. Patient-Audiences durchschauen Performance. Antworte auf Mail 2 wenn du reden willst — ja, nein, oder 'vielleicht, lass mal schauen'.

it.subtitle: per patient-advocate e creator gut-health — e cosa dice la ricerca
it.hero_quote: Foto dentro, AI classifica, PDF clinico fuori. Privacy-first. Guadagna dal valore che già crei.
it.sixty_seconds_intro: MyLoo è un tracker digestione/feci per iOS (Android in pausa — Google Health Policy 2026). Foto del campione, Claude Vision AI classifica sulla Bristol Stool Scale 1-7. Patient-advocate mid-tier (100k): 50.000 view x 2% CTR = 1.000 clic, 35% install = 350 install, 5% Premium = 17 abbonati, ~255 USD. Anonimo gut-health macro (300k TT): 150.000 view x 1% CTR = 1.500 clic, 30% install = 450 install, 4% Premium = 18 abbonati, ~270 USD. Utenti cronici tengono sub più a lungo della media.

faq: Sono professionista sanitario, posso postare?
Sì, in capacità personale con disclosure. Inquadra come 'strumento che i pazienti possono usare', non 'strumento che diagnostica'.
E Android?
Costruito e testato ma pausato al passo Google Health Policy (corporate-account + D-U-N-S). Tuo link funziona per Android — pagina waitlist.
Posso mostrare foto reali?
No. Privacy-first significa che le foto non sono mai salvate — è lo sblocco di fiducia. Usa la vista risultato strutturato.

Sì, rev-share = raccomandazione retribuita. Plus: professionisti sanitari seguono regole di condotta locali.
Compenso fisso?
Mid-tier $150-500, macro $500+. Rev-share resta sopra.
E se perdo credibilità di nicchia?
Non postare se MyLoo non rientra nella tua esperienza vissuta o contesto professionale.
it.closing: Onestà: MyLoo va bene con creator con vera esperienza gut-health o contesto professionale. Se non hai IBS, non lavori in healthcare, e la tua audience non è in una nicchia health, non va bene e preferiremmo che tu non postassi. Audience pazienti vedono attraverso la performance. Rispondi alla Mail 2 se vuoi parlarne.

"Pourquoi la Bristol scale compte et pourquoi personne ne te le dit" — educational.
do_dont: Do : poste seulement si tu as vraiment la condition ou travailles dans le secteur.

faceless_strategy.archetype: Éducateur patient anonyme. Pro santé en capacité personnelle. Compte chronique voix-off seulement.
hook_examples: Carrousel infographie Bristol scale silencieux.
30s screen-rec classification IA avec voix off.
"Privacy-first photo — ce que 'pas stockées' veut vraiment dire" — carrousel.
"Quoi apporter à ta première visite GI" — tutorial carrousel.
"5 apps qui aident vraiment avec l'IBS" — listicle, MyLoo #1-2.
Time-lapse symptom-tracking — main anonyme.
Comparaison Word-doc vs MyLoo split-screen.
format_templates: Carrousel educational : 6 slides, esthétique clinique calme.
do_dont: Do : ton clinique-calme — l'audience de MyLoo déteste l'esthétique wellness.
Do : cite sources crédibles (NHS, Mayo Clinic, Rome IV) en enseignant.
Don't : prétendre être patient si tu ne l'es pas.

audience_fit_poor: Angle diagnostique / 'IA te dit ce que tu as'.
Comptes lifestyle généraux sans connexion gut-health réelle.
fr.posting_cadence: Gut-health : dimanche soir + mercredi soir. IBS day-in-the-life : mardi-jeudi matin. Patient-advocate : tard soir 21-23h. 1 reel par semaine. Stories avec lien après rendez-vous GI guident conversion.
fr.conversion_math: 50% rev-share, 24 mois. Premium 4,99 USD/m ou 29,99 USD/y. IBS day-in-the-life micro (40k abonnés) : 20 000 vues x 2,5% CTR = 500 clics, 40% install = 200 installs, 6% Premium = 12 abonnés, ~180 USD par reel. Patient-advocate mid-tier (100k) : 50 000 vues x 2% CTR = 1 000 clics, 35% install = 350 installs, 5% Premium = 17 abonnés, ~255 USD. Anonyme gut-health macro (300k TT) : 150 000 vues x 1% CTR = 1 500 clics, 30% install = 450 installs, 4% Premium = 18 abonnés, ~270 USD. Utilisateurs chroniques gardent les subs plus longtemps que la moyenne.
fr.brand_assets: Logo, captures app, slides educational Bristol-scale (revues médicalement), identité visuelle clinique-calme et captions prêts : getklar.org/i/myloo/brand-assets.
faq: Je suis pro santé, je peux poster ?
Oui, en capacité personnelle avec disclosure. Cadre comme 'outil que les patients peuvent utiliser', pas 'outil qui diagnostique'.
Et Android ?
Construit et testé mais pausé à l'étape Google Health Policy (compte corporate + D-U-N-S). Ton lien marche pour Android — page waitlist.
Je peux montrer de vraies photos ?
Non. Privacy-first signifie que les photos ne sont jamais stockées — c'est le déblocage de confiance. Utilise la vue résultat structuré.
Disclosure ?
Oui, rev-share = recommandation rémunérée. Plus : pros santé suivent règles de conduite locales.
Compensation fixe ?
Mid-tier $150-500, macros $500+. Rev-share reste par-dessus.
Et si je perds ma crédibilité de niche ?
Ne poste pas si MyLoo ne colle pas à ton expérience vécue ou contexte professionnel.
fr.closing: Honnêtement : MyLoo colle avec des créateurs ayant une vraie expérience gut-health ou contexte professionnel. Si tu n'as pas d'IBS, ne travailles pas en healthcare, et ton audience n'est pas dans une niche santé, ça ne colle pas et on préférerait que tu ne postes pas. Les audiences patientes voient à travers la performance. Réponds à la Mail 2 si tu veux en parler.

es.subtitle: para patient-advocates y creators gut-health — y qué dice la investigación
es.hero_quote: Foto dentro, IA clasifica, PDF clínico fuera. Privacy-first. Gana del valor que ya creas.
es.sixty_seconds_intro: MyLoo es un tracker digestión/heces para iOS (Android en pausa — Google Health Policy 2026). Foto de la muestra, Claude Vision IA clasifica en la Bristol Stool Scale 1-7. Privacy-first: fotos NO almacenadas, solo resultado estructurado en timeline. Tags síntomas, PDF 30 días para cita GI.
es.why_this_works: El tracking en Word-doc es la realidad para el 80% de los pacientes IBS. MyLoo resuelve eso: en la cita GI muestras un PDF con datos reales en lugar de hablar retrospectivamente 4 semanas.
free_vs_premium: Gratis: entrada Bristol manual + tags síntomas, timeline, export PDF manual.
Premium (4,99 USD/m o 29,99 USD/y): clasificación IA foto, parsing email-inbound, export extendido.
Premium gratis de por vida para afiliados onboarded.
es.creator_types_intro: Para MyLoo específicamente, creators con experiencia vivida convierten dramáticamente más alto que cuentas estéticas — audiencias salud ven a través de la performance.

creator_types_table.hooks: Momento Word-doc; "cómo preparo mi cita GI"; reveal PDF 30 días; "por fin una herramienta que confío"
Timeline correlación comida-síntoma; "qué comí vs cómo me sentía"; historia descubrimiento desencadenante
Educational con datos personales; "por qué la Bristol scale importa"; "qué llevar a tu cita GI"
"Qué quisiera que mis pacientes rastrearan"; walkthrough clinical-grade; "el PDF que quiero en citas"
Educación Bristol scale silenciosa; tutorial tracking voiceless; demo privacy-first foto
Timeline recovery; "qué me ayudó a sentirme escuchado en citas"; valor tracking estructurado

ugc_strategy.archetype: Tú con la condición. Paciente IBS compartiendo day-in-the-life. Post-cirugía rastreando recovery. Patient-advocate con credibilidad. Health-condition content ve a través de la performance — tu experiencia vivida es todo el modelo de credibilidad.
hook_examples: "Esto reemplazó mi Word-doc" — talking head con Word-doc real 4 semanas, luego timeline MyLoo.
"Cómo preparo mi cita GI ahora" — calmo 60s, terminando con export PDF.
"Año uno de IBS — qué habría querido rastrear desde el día uno" — retrospectiva.
"Mi gastroenterólogo realmente trabajó con los datos esta vez" — debrief post-cita.
"La IA clasificó lo que no podía mirar" — ángulo privacy.
"Qué cambió en 30 días de tracking" — pattern-discovery.
"Por qué la Bristol scale importa y por qué nadie te lo dice" — educational.
do_dont: Do: postea solo si tienes realmente la condición o trabajas en el sector.

faceless_strategy.archetype: Educator paciente anónimo. Profesional sanitario en capacidad personal. Cuenta crónica voz-en-off solo.
hook_examples: Carrusel infografía Bristol scale silencioso.
30s screen-rec clasificación IA con voz en off.
"Privacy-first foto — qué significa 'no almacenadas' de verdad" — carrusel.
"Qué llevar a tu primera cita GI" — tutorial carrusel.
"5 apps que ayudan de verdad con IBS" — listicle, MyLoo #1-2.
Time-lapse symptom-tracking — mano anónima.
Comparación Word-doc vs MyLoo split-screen.
format_templates: Carrusel educational: 6 slides, estética clínica tranquila.
do_dont: Do: tono clínico-tranquilo — la audiencia de MyLoo odia la estética wellness.
Do: cita fuentes creíbles (NHS, Mayo Clinic, Roma IV) al enseñar.
Don't: fingir ser paciente si no lo eres.

audience_fit_poor: Ángulo diagnóstico / 'IA te dice qué tienes'.
Cuentas lifestyle generales sin conexión gut-health real.
es.posting_cadence: Gut-health: domingo noche + miércoles noche. IBS day-in-the-life: martes-jueves mañana. Patient-advocate: noche tarde 21-23h. 1 reel por semana. Stories con enlace después de citas GI guían conversión.
es.conversion_math: 50% rev-share, 24 meses. Premium 4,99 USD/m o 29,99 USD/y. IBS day-in-the-life micro (40k seguidores): 20.000 vistas x 2,5% CTR = 500 clics, 40% install = 200 instalaciones, 6% Premium = 12 suscriptores, ~180 USD por reel. Patient-advocate mid-tier (100k): 50.000 vistas x 2% CTR = 1.000 clics, 35% install = 350 instalaciones, 5% Premium = 17 suscriptores, ~255 USD. Anónimo gut-health macro (300k TT): 150.000 vistas x 1% CTR = 1.500 clics, 30% install = 450 instalaciones, 4% Premium = 18 suscriptores, ~270 USD. Usuarios crónicos mantienen subs más tiempo que la media.
es.brand_assets: Logo, capturas app, slides educational Bristol-scale (revisadas médicamente), identidad visual clínico-tranquila y captions listos: getklar.org/i/myloo/brand-assets.
faq: Soy profesional sanitario, ¿puedo postear?
Sí, en capacidad personal con disclosure. Enmarca como 'herramienta que los pacientes pueden usar', no 'herramienta que diagnostica'.
¿Y Android?
Construido y testeado pero pausado en el paso Google Health Policy (cuenta corporativa + D-U-N-S). Tu enlace funciona para Android — página waitlist.
¿Puedo mostrar fotos reales?
No. Privacy-first significa que las fotos nunca se almacenan — ese es el desbloqueo de confianza. Usa la vista resultado estructurado.
¿Disclosure?
Sí, rev-share = recomendación remunerada. Plus: profesionales sanitarios siguen reglas de conducta locales.
¿Compensación fija?
Mid-tier $150-500, macros $500+. Rev-share sigue encima.
¿Y si pierdo mi credibilidad de nicho?
No postees si MyLoo no encaja con tu experiencia vivida o contexto profesional.
es.closing: Honestamente: MyLoo encaja con creators con experiencia gut-health real o contexto profesional. Si no tienes IBS, no trabajas en healthcare, y tu audiencia no está en un nicho salud, no encaja y preferiríamos que no postees. Las audiencias de pacientes ven a través de la performance. Responde al Mail 2 si quieres hablarlo.
